example.en: I did trip him, but it wasn’t intentional.
example.zh: 我的确把他绊倒了，但不是故意的。

example.en: hard-working, thrifty people
example.zh: 勤劳节俭的人们

example.en: We support the call for the enactment of a Bill of Rights.
example.zh: 我们支持《权利法案》制定的呼吁。

example.en: The President proclaimed the republic’s independence.
example.zh: 总统宣布共和国独立。

example.en: a seafood restaurant
example.zh: 海鲜餐馆

example.en: In April 655, Osman’s palace was besieged by rebels.
example.zh: 公元655年4月，奥斯曼的宫殿遭到叛军围攻。

translations.text: 未经证实的,无事实根据的

example.en: unsubstantiated allegations of child abuse
example.zh: 未经证实的虐待儿童的指控

translations.text: 不知道的, 没觉察到的

phrases.zh: 没觉察到，没有意识到；不知道

example.en: Many people are unaware of just how much food and drink they consume.
example.zh: 许多人不知道自己到底消耗掉多少食物和饮料。

example.en: All the infected clothing was incinerated.
example.zh: 所有沾染了细菌的衣服都被焚化了。

example.en: This is a suburb with very narrow streets, because it was not mapped out by the municipal topographical office.
example.zh: 这个郊区地区的街道非常狭窄，因为没有经过市政地形办公室的规划。

phrases.zh: 春节（中国农历正月初一）

example.en: Christmas is one of the main festivals in the Christian Calendar.
example.zh: 圣诞节是基督教历的重大节日之一。

example.en: The canyon is famous for producing echoes.
example.zh: 这个峡谷以回声而闻名。

translations.text: 留置权,抵押品所产生的利息

example.en: Women still face prejudice in the workplace.
example.zh: 女性在职场中仍然面临歧视。

example.en: She lays a kindly hand like a tiny starfish on my knee.
example.zh: 她和善地伸出手，像小海星一样放在我的膝盖上。

example.en: She then dismembered him, hiding parts of his body in the cellar.
example.zh: 她接着将他的尸体肢解，把几块碎尸藏进了地窖。

example.en: The Eiffel Tower is unquestionably one of Paris’s most familiar landmarks.
example.zh: 埃菲尔铁塔无疑是巴黎最为人熟知的地标之一。

translations.text: (生物分类学上的)门, 语群
古时的小型竖琴, 小型立式钢琴
地位最高的人,至高,霸权

phrases.zh: 白人至上；白人至上主义

example.en: Japan’s unchallenged supremacy in the field of electronics
example.zh: 日本在电子领域无人挑战的领先地位

example.en: The rumor rocked the whole city.
example.zh: 谣言使整个城市惊慌不安。

example.en: He led me down a narrow passageway.
example.zh: 他带着我穿过一条狭窄的过道。

example.en: Gothic tattoos run along her back, and deep knife scars trace her shoulder.
example.zh: 她的背上布满了哥特式纹身，肩头上有深深的刀疤。

phrases.zh: 伪装而得以幸免；蒙混过关

example.en: One of the choppers set down on the beach below them, the other on the bluff above.
example.zh: 有一架直升机在他们下面的海滩上降落，其余的直接降落在断崖上。

example.en: Its versatility, flexibility, and wide range of implementations and environments make it difficult to describe procedures to cover all cases.
example.zh: 其通用性、灵活性以及广泛的实现和环境，使得描述能涵盖所有情况的过程非常困难。

example.en: The tonal range she uses is wide and varied.
example.zh: 她使用的色调丰富多彩。

phrases.zh: （汽车等的）油门踏板；[机]加速踏板

example.en: She put her foot down on the accelerator pedal.
example.zh: 她踩下了油门踏板。

phrases.zh: 难以忽视的真相（电影名称）

example.en: Monday’s a bit inconvenient for me. How about Wednesday?
example.zh: 周一我不太方便，周三如何？

example.en: campaign contributors
example.zh: 竞选捐助人

translations.text: 穿过, 渗透, 突破

phrases.zh: 焊透率；穿进速率；进尺速度

example.en: Cover the entire device to prevent water penetration.
example.zh: 把整台设备都罩住以免进水。

example.en: Mandy subtracted the date of birth from the date of death.
example.zh: 曼迪从死亡的日期减去了出生的日期。

translations.text: 壁炉地面, 家庭（生活）

example.en: It was winter and there was a huge fire roaring in the hearth.
example.zh: 时值冬天，壁炉里的炉火在熊熊燃烧。

example.en: A saguaro cactus stands tall amid a frenzy of lightning bolts in Arizona.
example.zh: 亚利桑那州，一株巨人柱仙人掌矗立在一团狂暴的闪电中。

example.en: The desire for peace transcended political differences.
example.zh: 对和平的渴望超越了政治分歧。

example.en: A largely Protestant nation that can trace its theological taproot to Martin Luther ought to know better.
example.zh: 作为一个主要由新教徒构成的国家，有必要了解到它的神学根源来自于马丁·路德。

phrases.zh: 烧成温度；点火温度；发火点
射速；燃料用量；燃烧率，燃烧速度

example.en: They saw a big flash and a huge ball of fire reaching hundreds of feet into the sky.
example.zh: 他们看到一道强光和一个巨大的火球直冲天空达几百英尺。

phrases.zh: 空气分配器；空气分布箱
独家经销商；独家发行人

example.en: ...Spain's largest distributor of petroleum products.
example.zh: …西班牙最大的石油产品经销商。

example.en: These were not the only changes that signified the end of boyhood.
example.zh: 这些不是表示男孩时代已结束的惟一变化。

example.en: The government was taking little heed of these threats.
example.zh: 政府对这些威胁几乎不当回事。

example.en: a Shakespeare seminar
example.zh: 莎士比亚研讨班

phrases.zh: 天然香辛料；天然调味料

translations.text: 使感觉不满, 不满足

example.en: There are questions to be raised about the adequacy of the inmates' legal representation.
example.zh: 关于监犯的法定代表是否够格会有一些问题被提出。

example.en: Their media have earned the reputation for being rather dull and uninteresting.
example.zh: 他们的媒体得到的名声是乏味无聊。

example.en: Alfred the Great acted his own spy, visiting Danish camps disguised as a minstrel.
example.zh: 他扮作吟游歌手到丹麦军队的营地里侦察。

phrases.zh: 不可逆过程；单向磁化过程

example.en: Fossil fuels have caused irreversible damage to the environment.
example.zh: 矿物燃料已对环境造成了不可挽回的破坏。

translations.text: 称赞, 表扬, 推荐

example.en: The paper was highly commended in the UK Press Awards.
example.zh: 该报获得了“英国新闻奖”的高度褒奖。

example.en: The role of these glands is to regulate calcium and phosphate in our bloodstream.
example.zh: 这些腺体的作用是稳定血液中钙质和磷酸盐的含量。

example.en: The pictures are worth about £10,000 apiece.
example.zh: 这些画每幅价值约一万英镑。

translations.text: 徒步者, 参加竞走者

example.en: The area is popular with walkers.
example.zh: 这地方很受徒步者欢迎。

phrases.zh: 非常重要的；极为重要的

example.en: Speak clearly and distinctly.
example.zh: 说话要清楚明白。

example.en: Ethel’s health has deteriorated.
example.zh: 埃塞尔的健康状况恶化了。

example.en: The rope was stretched taut.
example.zh: 绳子绷紧了。

example.en: Lower taxes would spur investment and help economic growth.
example.zh: 降低税率将刺激投资，有助于经济增长。

example.en: The two ambulance attendants quickly put Plover on a stretcher and got him into the ambulance.
example.zh: 这两名救护车的救护员迅速把普洛弗放在担架上并抬进了那辆救护车。

phrases.zh: 活着的，未屠宰；事先无准备地

example.en: The horses' hooves often could not get a proper grip.
example.zh: 这些马的蹄子经常踩不稳。

translations.text: 前肢(指四肢或多肢动物的)前脚

example.en: In a proper depiction the hindleg would be forward too, having moved before the foreleg.
example.zh: 正确的姿势应是，右后腿早应向前迈，并且应该在跨出前腿之前就迈出后腿。

example.en: Her position was fortified by election successes and economic recovery.
example.zh: 她的地位因为选举获胜及经济复苏而得到巩固。

translations.text: 吊裤带, 悬挂物, 吊杆, 袜吊

example.en: He also wore a pair of suspenders.
example.zh: 他也穿着吊带裤。

translations.text: 带扣 v扣住, 变弯曲

example.en: He wore a belt with a large brass buckle.
example.zh: 他系了一根有很大黄铜扣的皮带。

example.en: My shorts were chafing my thighs.
example.zh: 我的短裤蹭得我大腿疼。

example.en: That will work as a tourniquet.
example.zh: 就和止血带的功用一样了。

example.en: These days, her bandanna is usually red.
example.zh: 这些天，她的印花大手帕通常是红色的。

phrases.zh: 效验如神地；异常成功地

example.en: Joe’s boyish charm
example.zh: 乔身上的稚趣

example.en: The legs of snakes are vestigial or absent altogether.
example.zh: 蛇的腿已经退化或完全消失。

translations.text: （伊斯兰教教徒之）闺房, 为一个雄性动物所控制的许多雌性动物
珠穆朗玛峰(世界最高峰)

phrases.zh: 埃佛勒斯峰（喜马拉雅山主峰之一，中国称珠穆朗玛峰）

example.en: Workers dug a trench for gas lines.
example.zh: 工人们挖了一条沟来铺设煤气管道。

phrases.zh: 门罗主义；类似门罗主义的策略

example.en: Monroe followed Madison as president.
example.zh: 门罗接替麦迪逊当上总统。

translations.text: 勉强, 承认, 退让 vi让步

example.en: ‘That’s the only possible solution.’ ‘Yes, I suppose so,’ Charles conceded.
example.zh: “那是唯一可行的解决办法。”“对，我想是。”查尔斯承认道。

translations.text: 颚骨, 下颚骨, 信用 v赊买

example.en: selective schools
example.zh: 择优录取学生的学校

example.en: So why go to Iraq when you can go to Canada?
example.zh: 因此，如果你可以去加拿大的话，为什么要去伊拉克呢？

phrases.zh: 格兰德河（美国和墨西哥之间）

translations.text: 整容手术（除去面部皱纹）

example.en: I had a facelift in 1995, which went wrong.
example.zh: 我在1995年做了一次失败的面部拉皮手术。

translations.text: 捐赠品, 捐款, 贡献

example.en: There have been generous donations from EU funds.
example.zh: 欧盟基金给予了慷慨的捐款。

example.en: Tanakhat Monastery complex is located on a hill of a very picturesque massif.
example.zh: 塔纳哈修道院坐落在一处风景如画的山丘上。

phrases.zh: 阿特拉斯山脉（阿尔卑斯山系的一部分）
无线互联网；无线上网；无线网际网路

example.en: ...the fast-growing wireless communication market.
example.zh: …快速增长的无线通讯市场。

translations.text: 杀菌, 消毒, 使成不毛

example.en: Sterilize the bottles with boiling water.
example.zh: 用沸水把这些瓶子消毒。

example.en: After waiting a while, and with a fresh canary, the miners could safely reenter the mine.
example.zh: 过一段时间之后，如果新换上的金丝雀安然无恙，矿工们又可以安全地重返矿井。

example.en: Continuing violence will retard negotiations over the country's future.
example.zh: 持续不断的暴力活动会阻碍关于国家未来的谈判的进行。

example.en: There isa certain logicin their choice of architect.
example.zh: 他们对建筑师的选择是有一定道理的。

translations.text: (使)腐烂, (使)腐败 n腐烂, 腐败

example.en: Candy will rot your teeth.
example.zh: 吃糖会腐蚀牙齿。

translations.text: 满意, 满足, 令人满意的事物

example.en: She got great satisfaction from helping people to learn.
example.zh: 她在帮助人们学习的过程中得到很大的满足。

example.en: And last but not least, people with whom you can build a rapport and camaraderie with.
example.zh: 一直到最后、并非最不重要的一个人，与你建立起和谐融洽的友谊。

example.en: He was elevated to the post of president.
example.zh: 他被提拔到总裁的职位。

phrases.zh: 绯闻少女（美国一青春偶像剧）

example.en: Phil’s in there, having a gossip with Maggie.
example.zh: 菲尔在那里面跟玛吉闲聊。

example.en: We have an average attendance of 4,000 fans per game.
example.zh: 每场比赛平均有4,000名球迷来观战。

translations.text: 社会化, 社会主义化

example.en: Schools play an important part in the socialization of our children.
example.zh: 学校对儿童适应社会的过程起着重要的作用。

translations.text: 爱尔兰人(的),爱尔兰语（的）

phrases.zh: n. 爱尔兰咖啡（一种鸡尾酒）

example.en: I am starting to sense that maybe I and people like me are to blame because it is we, the Irish people, who are paying with our jobs, livelihoods, health care and education.
example.zh: 我开始感觉到或许就是我以及像我这样的人，该受责备，因为就是我们，让爱尔兰人民，正在为我们的工作、生活、医疗卫生和教育买单。

example.en: One eyewitness said he saw her talking to a man in a blue car.
example.zh: 一名目击者说他看见她在跟一个坐在蓝色汽车里的男子说话。

example.en: an international conglomerate
example.zh: 国际大型联合企业

example.en: Several gangs were operating in the area.
example.zh: 有好几个犯罪团伙在这个地区活动。

example.en: A new computer system entails a lot of re-training.
example.zh: 使用新的计算机系统需要大量的再培训。

example.en: The guard punched my ticket and I got on.
example.zh: 守卫在我的票上打孔后，我就上去了。

translations.text: 铺设中的铁路末端, 终点

example.en: preferential credit terms for reliable borrowers
example.zh: 向可靠借款人提供的优惠信贷条件

example.en: a cerebral haemorrhage
example.zh: 脑出[溢]血

example.en: Let us now fuse together now as one people who want to do something for the people of Kenya. Let us strengthen the foundation of multiparty democracy in our country.
example.zh: 现在让我们融汇在一起，团结起来，就像希望为肯尼亚人民作一些事情的同一个人，让我们一起巩固我国多党民主制的基础。

phrases.zh: 国际音标；国际语音字母

example.en: The modern Russian alphabet has 31 letters.
example.zh: 现代俄语字母表有31个字母。

example.en: The branch snapped cleanly in two.
example.zh: 树枝啪的一下断成两截。

example.en: the unresolved issue of who will pay for the project
example.zh: 项目由谁出资这个悬而未决的问题

example.en: What’s for lunch?
example.zh: 午饭吃什么？

example.en: The choreography of Eric Hawkins is considered radical by ballet audiences.
example.zh: 埃里克·霍金斯的舞蹈编排被芭蕾舞剧的观众认为是不同凡响的。

example.en: God, said, ‘Let the waters teem with countless living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the vault of heaven.
example.zh: 上帝说：“水中要有万种游鱼，地上要有无数飞鸟”于是上帝创造出种类繁多的大小鱼类及飞鸟。

example.en: What have you been doing lately?
example.zh: 你最近在干什么？

example.en: ...an ever increasing scarcity of water.
example.zh: …越来越匮乏的水资源。

example.en: The documentary premiered at the Jerusalem Film Festival.
example.zh: 那部记录片在耶路撒冷电影节上首映。

phrases.zh: 丝印；丝幕法；丝网漏印法

example.en: a screening of Spielberg’s new movie
example.zh: 斯皮尔伯格的新片放映

example.en: a company with an exemplary record on environmental issues
example.zh: 在处理环境问题方面可作为楷模的公司

translations.text: 奥地利的, 奥地利人的

example.en: When I began to cough, I blamed it on the Austrian cigarettes.
example.zh: 当我开始咳嗽时，我把这事怪在抽奥地利的香烟上。

phrases.zh: 分水岭地区；分水界域；集水面积

example.en: The election of Mary Robinson in 1990 was a watershed in Irish politics.
example.zh: 1990年玛丽·鲁滨逊的当选是爱尔兰政治的分水岭。

example.en: Whether you are a carpenter or a therapist, a homemaker or a professor, it makes no difference.
example.zh: 不论你是一个木匠或是一个治疗师，一个家庭主妇还是教授，这都没有区别。

example.en: ...this vast chronicle of Napoleonic times.
example.zh: …这本关于拿破仑时期的大部头编年史。

example.en: As chemical precursors stream onto the surface of a rolling metal or plastic substrate, they react with one another to form a network of nanoparticles.
example.zh: 各化学母质流向滚动中的金属或塑料基片的表面，他们互相作用，形成一层纳米级微粒网状结构。

example.en: Without sustenance, the animals will soon die.
example.zh: 没有食物，动物很快就会死亡。

translations.text: 慈善事业的,慷慨的,仁慈的

example.en: charitable groups
example.zh: 慈善团体

example.en: a very pleasing outlook from the bedroom window
example.zh: 从卧室窗户看出去的宜人景色

example.en: a perceptive young man
example.zh: 一个观察敏锐的年轻人

example.en: She received a small legacy from her aunt.
example.zh: 她从姨妈那里继承了一小笔遗产。

example.en: You said in your address that "developing excellence is a slow, painstaking process".
example.zh: 你在你的致词中说“发展卓越性是一个缓慢艰苦的过程”。

translations.text: 没有自信的, 不确定的

example.en: Chris seemed nervous and unsure of herself.
example.zh: 克丽丝显得紧张，没有自信。

example.en: Could there have been a really large dam that caused a deep lake in both Zharu and the main valleys and is older than the loess deposits?
example.zh: 这儿有可能有一个真正巨大的大坝，导致扎如和主峡谷之间的深湖，并且时间比黄土沉积物还久远吗？

example.en: With these layers downloaded, you can combine them with the base reflectivity image to produce a more easily readable image map.
example.zh: 下载了这些图层之后，您可以把它们与基本反射率图像结合起来生成更易于阅读的图像地图。

translations.text: 使戒除(或放弃)习惯,使不习惯
粗糙, 未加工, 粗糙程度

phrases.zh: 表面粗糙度；表面光洁度

example.en: Performance testing to gauge the scalability and responsiveness of new services should always be part of the plan.
example.zh: 性能测试用于测定新服务的可伸缩性和响应能力，应当是计划的一部分。

translations.text: 区分, 分割 n分割, 划分

example.en: Korea was partitioned in 1945.
example.zh: 朝鲜是1945年被分割的。

example.en: Net neutrality, or not?
example.zh: 网络中立或不?

example.en: Some soils are actually too alkaline for certain plant life.
example.zh: 有些土壤的碱性，实际上对某些植物的生长是过高的。

example.en: ...an eighteenth century ballad about some lost children called the Babes in the Wood.
example.zh: …一首关于迷路儿童的名为《丛林中的宝贝》的18世纪民间叙事诗。

example.en: The parliaments of Australia and Indonesia have yet to ratify the treaty.
example.zh: 澳大利亚和印度尼西亚议会还未批准该条约。

example.en: He conflates two images from Kipling’s short stories in the film.
example.zh: 影片中，他把吉卜林短篇小说中的两个人物形象合并在一起。

example.en: a sheet of cardboard
example.zh: 一张卡纸

translations.text: 问答教学法, 问答集

example.en: We were taught to recite the catechism.
example.zh: 我们学会背诵教义问答。

example.en: ...clouds which lift warm, moist air by convection high into the atmosphere.
example.zh: ...云层通过对流把温暖湿润的空气送到高的大气层中。

example.en: I’ll have to rewrite most of the essay.
example.zh: 这篇论文大部分我都得重写。

example.en: Riskier investments tend to be counterbalanced by high rewards.

example.zh: 它具有难以置信的强度和弹性，而其异常的高导电性和半导体中灵活的应用可以提高计算能力。

example.zh: 一本关于生物化学和生理学的书

example.zh: 回到缅因州，要是斯科特把一件脏衣服丢进衣物篮我就开始感谢他。

example.zh: 由于市场固有的流动性和即时性，所以我们经常构建新知识领域。

example.zh: 党的忠诚支持者们一如既往地以挥舞旗帜和高举海报作为回应。

example.zh: 当其他人核查他们的代码时，您将看到它像引入您的工作空间一样。

example.zh: 因为穴居鱼可能并不需要睡得更少——它们可能需要保持清醒，以便更经常地在食物短缺和食物不常出现的环境中觅食。

example.zh: 他原谅了儿子的幼稚行为。

example.zh: 他传球准确无误。

example.en: The term "Arabian Gulf" has been in casual but inconsistent use by various members of the US navy and government, and by many Arab states, for a few decades now.

example.zh: 尽管如此，数据洪水正在开始改变商业、政府、科学和人们的日常生活。

example.en: This monolithic environment for an application eliminated any concern about which clock to use -- because there was only one clock.
example.zh: 对于一个应用程序的这个单块集成电路环境消除了使用哪个时钟的问题 —— 因为只有一个时钟。

example.zh: 海军将主要将该计算机用于海洋图像建模和天气预报。

example.zh: 在这个科学与宗教到底相容还是不相容众说纷纭的时候 还是让我们重新审视一下牛顿和爱因斯坦怎么说主吧。

example.zh: 对于伽达默尔来说古典主义，或者传统，最伟大之处是这是我们可以分享的。

example.zh: …约翰A.西布莉园艺中心。

example.zh: 多数人不必因哮喘或肺炎住院。

example.en: But now there is evidence that individualized advice can also be physiologically effective — that it can actually change your neural pathways.
example.zh: 但是现在有证据表明，个性化的建议也可以产生生理影响——事实上它可以改变你的神经通路。

example.zh: 男孩一动不动站着，好像一只老鼠或花栗鼠知道有人在盯着它一样。

example.zh: 那一信息的核心是和平绝不应该成为对任何人有利或不利的根源。

example.zh: 在他的领导下，联合国的名望得到了极大提升。

example.zh: 但有一点很肯定，如果甲烷排放量确实是如此大，必将产生严重的生物和地球化学影响。

example.zh: 空中爆炸过去之后，经过压缩的小水滴使它看上去就像一朵正常的白云一样。

持续性植物状态；植物状态

example.zh: 她处于一种被称为植物人的状态。

example.zh: 但是，在有些情况下这是达到目标最快的一种方式。

example.en: The expression ‘full moon’ means the fourteenth day of the moon reckoned from its first appearance.
example.zh: 所谓“满月”是指从新月初现算起的第14天。

example.en: After that is the chromosphere, a layer that looks reddish because of all the hydrogen found there.

example.en: Usage: Mainly used in chemical, glass, dyestuff, ceramic and mechanic.
example.zh: 用途：主要用于化学、 玻璃、染料、冶金、机械、搪瓷等工业。

example.en: The outrigger tripod is available in both a high and low profile version, to fulfill a diverse array of environmental requirements.

example.en: Yet this we ask ere you leave us, that you speak to us and give us of your truth.
example.zh: 然而在你离开我们之前，对我们说话，把你的真理传述给我们。

example.en: At the Marriott, for example, guests ramble amid breadfruit and frangipani trees and photograph one another by an enormous, amoeba-shaped swimming pool.
example.zh: 比如，在万豪酒店，客人们可以在面包果树和鸡蛋花树之间徜徉，在硕大的不规则形状游泳池边相互拍照。

example.zh: 通过海港，日本也因为芋头的质量高，于是从郴州中进口。

example.en: The tight race is almost a duplicate of the elections in Georgia and South Dakota last month that pitted a Republican challenger against a Democratic incumbent.

example.zh: 我们已经参看过福斯特爵士的计划，看起来他似乎想把他想象中的谷岛机场安置在液化天然气厂和发电站的顶上。

example.zh: 美国印第安人展厅的图腾柱和波尼土房也吸引了不少观众，那里展示了内布拉斯加州印第安人部落波尼人的传统生活方式。

example.zh: 这队考古学家发现了起初埋葬他骸骨的地方。

example.zh: 整个营地的宽度为400步。

example.zh: 有机物依赖于磷来制造核酸和其他生长与繁殖所需的分子。

example.zh: 有一小群记者守候在她家外面的人行道上。

example.zh: 与此同时，在其他问题上，比如经济刺激计划、医保改革以及伊拉克问题，他不止一次改弦易辙、转向中庸，这让他最热心的支持者感到失望。

example.zh: 我同情那些得依靠如此微薄的收入养活全家的人。

example.zh: 一次尸检最终把这名婴儿的死亡归因于婴儿猝死综合症。

example.zh: 她在多个委员会担任委员。

example.en: ...a process of social, economic and political change which involves the totality of human experience.
example.zh: ...一个涉及人类经验总和的社会、经济和政治变革过程。

example.en: We have reminded them of the circumstances of our emigration and settlement here.
example.zh: 我们也曾把我们移民来这里和在这里定居的情况告诉他们。

phrases.zh: n. 格里高利·派克（美国男影星）

translations.text: 家长, 族长, 创办人

example.en: The patriarch of the house, Mr. Jawad, rules it with a ferocity renowned throughout the neighbourhood.
example.zh: 那户人家的家长贾瓦德先生治家严苛，名闻乡里。

example.en: The most visited city in the world, here is a capital whose great talent has been to interweave the grandeur of its official buildings with the everyday charm of its many quartiers.
example.zh: 世界上访问者最多的城市，就是这里，拥有庞大人才资本的首都，这城市中庄严肃穆的官方建筑与许多城区的日常魅力始终融合在一起。

phrases.zh: 开天辟地以来，自古以来

example.en: everlasting fame
example.zh: 永久的名声

example.zh: 在远方地平线上，矗立着一个世纪以来开采石油产生的碎石堆。

example.en: After rising through the air it stops to hover outside the window of a building several storeys high.
example.zh: 在空气中上升后，它在一幢几层楼高的建筑物的窗前停止升高，进入盘旋状态。

example.en: The house is nearing completion (= almost finished ) .
example.zh: 房子即将完工。

example.en: Stories abound about when he was in charge.
example.zh: 他负责时传闻很多。

类脂物代谢作用；类脂化合物代谢作用

example.en: Cholesterol, a type of lipid, is found in foods from animal sources.
example.zh: 胆固醇也是一种油脂，存在于动物来源的食物中。

example.en: a smoky engine
example.zh: 冒出大量烟的引擎

example.en: The constitution also confers large powers on Brazil's 25 constituent states.
example.zh: 宪法还授予巴西25个成员州极大的权力。

example.en: primeval forests
example.zh: 原始森林

example.en: ...a 65-year-old patient suffering from severe viral pneumonia.
example.zh: …一位65岁患有严重病毒性肺炎的病人。

example.zh: 换句话说，我们可以借助减法的魔力。

example.zh: 同心圆

example.en: Poor mite! You must be starving!
example.zh: 可怜的小家伙！你一定是饿坏了！

example.zh: 儿童学习语言的能力是与生俱来的。

example.en: the many indigenous cultures which existed in Siberia
example.zh: 存在于西伯利亚的许多当地文化

example.en: It will be a cold night, and there may be fog patches .
example.zh: 今夜天气寒冷，部分地区可能有雾。

phrases.zh: 超新星遗迹，超新星残骸

example.en: Beneath the present church were remnants of Roman flooring.
example.zh: 在目前的这座教堂下面还有残余的古罗马地板。

example.zh: 她举手投足优雅而高贵。

example.zh: 德尔塔与新加坡航空公司的协议为他们在太平洋地区提供了一个立足点。

example.zh: 明智的预防措施

example.zh: 在我们所在的银河系中，很可能存在数以万计的行星系。

example.en: The police say they suspect the attack was carried out by animal rights activists.
example.zh: 警方说他们怀疑这次袭击是由保护动物权利的激进分子实施的。

phrases.zh: 大声抗议；叫嚣声；追捕犯人时的叫喊声

example.en: a golden hue
example.zh: 一种金黄色调

example.en: His body was taken to Brighton mortuary for identification.
example.zh: 他的尸体被送到布赖顿停尸所确认身份。

example.en: Another one turned the doorknob but it was locked.
example.zh: 另一个扭了一下门把手但它是锁住的。

example.zh: 这孩子喋喋不休，她开始烦躁起来。

example.en: Carbon monoxide is released when carbon in fuel—both plants and fossil fuels like gasoline—burns incompletely.

example.zh: 他呼吸很浅，脉搏微弱。

example.zh: “他拥有三家酒店。”其他人都相应地露出了钦佩之情。

example.zh: 作为一种无色、带着甜蜜香味的液体，常被用于塑料生产。

example.zh: 我们员工的奉献精神和专业素质

example.zh: 看着自己心爱的宠物不停地挠啊挠相当令人烦躁——尤其是在你费尽心思除去那些害虫的时候。

phrases.zh: 黏性减振器，黏性阻尼器；粘性阻尼器

example.en: The spikes are believed to be caused by an electrical malfunction; the thud is thought, at least by some, to be just a ventilator damper.
example.zh: 操作员们认为仪表显示峰值只是因为电气故障，而巨响被认为是通风阻尼器所发出的声音，至少有一部分人这么认为。

example.zh: 智力平庸的人

example.zh: 给每道菜配上一小枝芫荽然后上菜。

example.zh: 使用照片编辑软件中的自动控制功能可以免去手工转换照片的沉闷。

example.zh: 喜马拉雅山脉的山麓丘陵

example.zh: 重大决定

example.en: I followed him to this island chateau where he's holding a party.
example.zh: 我跟踪他来到这座岛上城堡。他将在这里举办宴会。

example.zh: 赖特对美国的地方偏狭观念愈发感到沮丧。

example.zh: 用贝壳做的首饰

example.zh: 他不会辞职，因为他不是个半途而废的人。

example.zh: 突如其来的变化弄得朱迪心神不宁。

example.en: But this is only at an early stage of feasibility study.
example.zh: 但是这仅仅处于可行性研究的初期阶段。

example.zh: 源源不断的人流

phrases.zh: 调度中心；运输中心；勤务中心

example.en: Goods are normally dispatched within 24 hours.
example.zh: 货物一般在24小时内派送。

example.en: There’s plenty of fun for all the family.
example.zh: 可以让全家人玩得很开心。

example.en: His action had been greeted with almost universal disapproval.
example.zh: 他的行动遭到了几乎一致的反对。

example.en: the junction of Abbot Road and Mill Street
example.zh: 阿伯特路与米尔街的交叉口

example.en: ...an upriver trip in Central Africa.
example.zh: ...在中非的一次沿河而上的旅行。

example.zh: 预示着灾难的奇怪事件

example.en: My sister has been preaching at me again about my lack of neatness.
example.zh: 因我不爱整洁姐姐又向我没完没了地劝告。

example.zh: 例如，为了保护加利福利亚州的圣克鲁兹岛，除去羊和牛，让非本土植物不加抑制地广泛生长于此地。

example.zh: 火车沿着轨道嘎嚓嘎嚓地缓慢行驶着。

example.en: In this study, we examine how intercommunity relationships affect the growth of organizational communities.
example.zh: 在本文中，我们研究了共同性关系是如何影响组织社区的成长的。

example.zh: 参赛者们有6分钟的时间来给4只羊剪毛。

example.zh: 塞默－沃特城自豪的居民们

example.en: His was a utopian vision of nature in its purest form.
example.zh: 他对大自然的看法是一种最纯粹的乌托邦式看法。

example.en: This correlation suggests that a warming climate is driving this biogeochemical change, Drevnick says.
example.zh: 德莱夫尼克说，这种关联性表明，气候变暖正在推动这种生物地球化学变化。

example.en: The prince's destiny was predetermined from the moment of his birth.
example.zh: 该王子的命运从出生那一刻起就已经被决定了。

example.zh: 指那些对所收看的节目内容不加选择的观众。

example.zh: 如果一致意见是你应该继续留任，那么我会以一名普通议员的身份忠诚地支持政府。

example.zh: 你能明确地说她是饿死的吗？

example.zh: 人类社会的高科技可能将我们自愚昧势力的控制之中拯救出来，并重建一个田园诗般的自然状态，这曾是一个有吸引力的愿景。

example.en: The houses were left in haste and all the things were abandoned. It is so strange to see pieces of furniture, housewares and numerous photos with no people around.
example.zh: 匆忙中人们抛下了房子，任何东西都不可以带走。在空无一人的地方看着这些家具、生活用品和照片，感觉是如此诡异。

example.en: He evaded police by climbing through a window and shinning down a drainpipe.
example.zh: 他翻窗从排水管爬下，从而躲过了警察。

example.en: Will someone take out the trash (= take it outside the house ) ?
example.zh: 谁把垃圾拿出去好吗？

example.en: We pulled into the weedy parking lot.
example.zh: 我们开进了杂草丛生的停车场。

example.en: But the little mermaid had no occasion to do this, for the polypi sprang back in terror when they caught sight of the glittering draught, which shone in her hand like a twinkling star.
example.zh: 可是小人鱼没有这样做的必要，固为当珊瑚虫一看到这亮晶晶的药水——它在她的手里亮得像一颗闪耀的星星——的时候，它们就在她面前惶恐地缩回去了。

phrases.zh: 格列高利圣咏（教皇格列高利一世采用，常无伴奏）

example.en: ...a Gregorian chant.
example.zh: …一首格列高利圣歌。

phrases.zh: 皇冠假日酒店（五星级酒店品牌）

example.en: Across the busy plaza, vendors sell hot dogs and croissant sandwiches.
example.zh: 忙碌的露天广场对面，小贩们在卖热狗和新月形面包三明治。

example.en: ...the hill where St. George slew the dragon.
example.zh: …圣乔治屠龙之丘。

example.en: She apologized for accusing him falsely.
example.zh: 她为错误地咒骂他而道歉。

example.en: Discovering these patterns is the key to emergent design.
example.zh: 发现这些模式是紧急设计的关键。

example.en: This may be partly for fear of making a near-reality of private landownership, which would undermine one of the last vestiges of the party’s communist heritage.
example.zh: 这要部分归结于中共害怕在实际上造成土地私有制之嫌，因为这样会摧毁其共产主义的最后一道防线。

translations.text: 形而上学的, 纯粹哲学的

example.en: A lot of scientists don’t like discussing metaphysical matters.
example.zh: 很多科学家不喜欢讨论形而上学的东西。

example.en: His voice sounded feeble and far away.
example.zh: 他的声音听上去既无力又遥远。

example.en: a joyous occasion
example.zh: 欢乐的场合

example.en: a forceful attack on government policy
example.zh: 对政府政策的有力抨击

example.en: Wells finally agreed, but with reluctance.
example.zh: 韦尔斯最终同意了，但很勉强。

example.en: Their engagement was announced in the paper.
example.zh: 他们订婚的消息在报上公布了。

example.en: I never touched your purse, I swear!
example.zh: 我绝对没有碰过你的钱包，我发誓！

example.en: He killed his wife’s lover.
example.zh: 他杀了妻子的情人。

phrases.zh: 转移修饰语；转类形容词

example.en: But it is impossible to predict the reaction of a man accosted by another with the words "you rat" without referring to the meaning that the man spoken to attaches to the epithet.
example.zh: 但是，当你不带意识地，说出别人的绰号“老鼠”的时候，你还是无法预测这个人会有怎样的反应。

example.en: a collapsible chair
example.zh: 折叠式椅子

example.en: a scruffy old pair of jeans
example.zh: 一条不干净的旧牛仔裤

example.en: derisive laughter
example.zh: 嘲讽的笑

example.en: a messy room
example.zh: 凌乱的房间

example.en: What we are witnessing here is human misery on a vast scale.
example.zh: 我们在这里所目睹的情景是许许多多的人都生活困苦。

example.en: a fragmentary account
example.zh: 零星的叙述

example.en: Description: Metal lumps or ingots, silver grey with metallic lustre , easily oxidizable in air.
example.zh: 说明：金属锭或块，银灰色，有金属光泽，在空气中易氧化。

example.en: It reacts violently with oxygen difluoride and barium peroxide .
example.zh: 一氧化碳同氟化氧、氧化钡会发生剧烈反应。

example.en: It has zirconium/hydrogen reaction rate and where it occurred, obviously about the same place. The percentage reaction.
example.zh: 它有锆或氢的反应速率,它发生的位置，很明显是在同样位置,百分比反应。

example.en: The case has generated enormous publicity in Brazil.
example.zh: 这起犯罪事件已在巴西引起了公众的极大关注。

translations.text: 毫不费力地, 轻易地
理想主义的, 空想的

example.en: idealistic young doctors
example.zh: 充满理想主义的年轻医生

phrases.zh: 泡罩包装；硬质泡沫塑料衬垫包装

example.en: New shoes always give me blisters.
example.zh: 我穿新鞋脚上总是起泡。

example.en: The Prize consists of a statuette - “the Nkosi” - and 100,000 euros, which are to be awarded to a direct aid project in the spirit of the young winner’s efforts.
example.zh: 奖品是一座价值100，000欧元的“恩科西”小雕像，该奖旨在嘉奖年轻获奖者在直接参与帮助事件上所付出的精神努力。

example.en: featureless plains
example.zh: 毫无特色的平原

example.en: It has never been weaker as a political creed .
example.zh: 作为一种政治信条，它从来没有像现在这样衰微过。

example.en: his scraggly gray beard
example.zh: 他那散乱的灰白胡子

example.en: ...his zeal for teaching.
example.zh: …他对教学的热衷。

example.en: a very slapdash piece of work
example.zh: 干得非常马虎的工作

example.en: We were each handed a badge with our name on it.
example.zh: 我们每个人都拿到一个徽章，上面有我们的名字。

example.en: ...a shrubby tree.
example.zh: ...一棵灌木状的树木。

example.en: a brutal man
example.zh: 一个凶残的男人

phrases.zh: 影响；撞击；侵犯；紧密接触

example.en: ...the cuts in defence spending that have impinged on two of the region's largest employers.
example.zh: ...已经对该地区两个最大雇主产生重大影响的防御开支消减。

example.en: Great rocks rolled down the mountainside.
example.zh: 巨大的岩石顺着山坡滚落下来。

example.en: Even if the air stays bitterly cold, these sunbaked rocks can warm enough to melt whatever tiny patches of snow have escaped the thirsty wind.
example.zh: 即使空气十分寒冷，这些裸晒的岩石仍然能有足够的热量去融化那些在饥渴的风里逃过一劫的小雪块。

phrases.zh: 专家证词；鉴定人证据；专家作证

example.en: Barker’s testimony is crucial to the prosecution’s case.
example.zh: 巴克的证词对控方的指控起到了关键作用。

example.en: Methods outlined in the monograph include: use of crushed clay pots, bone charcoal, contact precipitation, or use of activated alumina (absorptive filter).
example.zh: 专著中概述的方法包括：使用粗砂壶、骨炭、接触沉淀，或使用活性氧化铝（吸收型过滤器）。

example.en: In this depiction of the rod-shaped E. coli, two flagella trail from one end while hairlike pili surround a capsule full of tangled nucleoids.
example.zh: 在创作这个杆状的大肠杆菌时，其表现出的形式为一端甩出两条鞭毛，同时细微的菌毛围绕在布满凌乱菌核的荚膜上。

example.en: My wee boy is three.
example.zh: 我的小儿子三岁。

translations.text: 不漏水的, 无懈可击的

example.en: Lucky for him, his alibi is watertight.
example.zh: 算他走运，不在犯罪现场的证据无懈可击。

example.en: philosophers who accept scientific rationalism
example.zh: 接受科学唯理论的哲学家们

phrases.zh: 故意的不良行为 条约法律；渎职

example.en: There is a willful self-destructiveness in the air here as if America has all the time and money in the world for petty politics.
example.zh: 这里的空气里中弥漫着一种故意自我毁灭的气息，为了狭隘的政治，美国好像在全世界有的是金钱和时间。

phrases.zh: 信贷可靠性；信誉；信贷价值

example.en: So we must ask what lends objective worthiness to a life outside the moral realm.
example.zh: 所以在道德范畴之外，我们必须设问，是什么东西带给人生客观性的值得。

translations.text: 狭隘道德观的, 说教的

example.en: It’s difficult to talk to teenagers about drugs without sounding too moralistic.
example.zh: 跟青少年谈论毒品，又不能有太重的说教味道，这是很难的。

example.en: A conscientious teacher may feel inclined to take work home.
example.zh: 一个认真负责的教师可能会想着把工作带回家去做。

example.en: His grammar and syntax, both in oral and written expression, were much better than the average.
example.zh: 无论在口头还是笔头上，他的语法和句法都非常出众。

example.en: ‘I’m a prisoner in my own home.’ ‘Nonsense!’
example.zh: “我在自己家里就像个囚犯。”“胡说！”

example.en: The court ruled that the contract must be terminated.
example.zh: 法庭裁决该合同必须终止。

example.en: a playful little dog
example.zh: 活泼的小狗

example.en: discontinuity in economic development
example.zh: 经济发展的间断性

example.en: a prosaic writing style
example.zh: 乏味的写作风格

example.en: laws to prevent discrimination
example.zh: 防止歧视的法律

example.en: But he could say vowel clearly and began to learn vocabulary.
example.zh: 但是他已经能清楚地说元音并开始学习词汇。

example.en: The dew gathered on the leaves.
example.zh: 露水在叶片上聚集。

example.en: ...the burial shroud.
example.zh: …下葬裹尸布。

example.en: These dogs are absolutely fearless.
example.zh: 这些狗什么都不怕。

example.en: The plan was doomed from the start .
example.zh: 这个计划一开始就注定要失败。

example.en: They’ve installed the new computer network at last.
example.zh: 他们终于安装了新电脑网络。

example.en: Land was seemingly limitless in extend and, therefore, not highly priced, and almost every colonist wanted to be a landholder.
example.zh: 土地似乎广阔无垠，因此价钱不高，而几乎所有的殖民地人都想成为土地拥有者。

translations.text: 紧急情况, 突然事件

example.en: Lifeguards are trained to deal with emergencies.
example.zh: 救生员接受过应对紧急情况的训练。

translations.text: 可经营的, 可使用的

example.en: a workable solution to the problem
example.zh: 解决这一问题的可行方法

example.en: His moralism is all-encompassing and as passionate as can be. He plans to replace state welfare provision with faith-based charitable organisations that would impose Christian family values.
example.zh: 他的道德说教可谓包罗万象,激情澎湃.他计划创建以信仰为基础的慈善机构来代替国家福利事业,以滋养基督家庭的社会价值观.

example.en: Large dunes make access to the beach difficult in places.
example.zh: 在有些地方大沙丘使得靠近海滩很难。

phrases.zh: 专制君主国；君主专制政体

example.en: the abolition of the monarchy
example.zh: 君主制的废除

translations.text: 民族主义, 国家主义

phrases.zh: 经济民族主义，经济国家主义
黑人民族主义；黑人国家主义

example.en: Scottish national­ism
example.zh: 苏格兰民族主义

example.en: Do you want me to eat dirt from a flowerpot?
example.zh: 你想让我把花盆里的土都吃了还是咋地？

example.en: ...a well-maintained used car with a good resale value.
example.zh: …一部维护良好的、可以转卖个好价钱的旧车。

example.en: The firm was accused of dubious accounting practices.
example.zh: 该公司被指控有不诚实的会计行为。

example.en: ...a delightful river with a profusion of wild flowers along its banks.
example.zh: ...一条令人愉悦的河，岸上开满了野花。

example.en: Armenia lacks a seacoast or a port.
example.zh: 亚美尼亚没有海岸和港口。

example.en: a lush green mountainous island
example.zh: 草木茂盛苍翠、山峦起伏的岛

phrases.zh: 凹底很深的酒瓶；香槟酒瓶

example.en: I drank a cup of champagne.
example.zh: 我喝了一杯香槟。

example.en: Those pesky kids!
example.zh: 那些讨厌的孩子！

example.en: a sorrowful expression
example.zh: 悲伤的表情

example.en: The strike has taken on overtones of a civil rights campaign.
example.zh: 这次罢工带有民权运动的意味。

phrases.zh: 月经垫；卫生巾（等于sanitary napkin）

example.en: Have you got a clean towel I could use?
example.zh: 你有没有干净毛巾给我用？

example.en: They purposefully keep people misinformed and fearful through their control of the media.
example.zh: 他们有目的地通过所控制的媒体来误导和恐吓民众。

example.en: the revolution that failed to dislodge the British in 1919
example.zh: 未能推翻英国统治的1919年革命

example.en: He never had a heart attack, but that surgery was similarly prompted by complaints about chest pain and shortness of breath.
example.zh: 他没有心脏病发作过，但是这个手术也同样被提示关于胸痛和气短的疾病。

example.en: She cannot accuse me of showing a bit of deceitful softness.
example.zh: 她不能控诉我说我表示过一点虚伪的温柔。

translations.text: 行为主义者, 行为科学家

example.en: And from a behaviorist point of view this is because of the associative history of these things.
example.zh: 在行为主义者看来,这是在这些事物之间的联结历史造成的。

phrases.zh: 铝箔（作包装材料）；锡箔纸

example.en: chocolates in foil wrappers
example.zh: 箔纸包的巧克力

example.en: newsworthy events
example.zh: 值得报道的事件

phrases.zh: 紧迫的威胁；逼近的威胁

example.en: A new trade agreement is imminent.
example.zh: 一项新的贸易协定即将签署。

example.en: Pick a partner and practice passing, for if you pass proficiently, perhaps you'll play professionally.
example.zh: 选择一位队员练习传球，如果你能熟练地传球，你或许会成为一位专业球员。

example.en: “This form of behavior — independence, locomotor capacity, parental care and development — could be similar to the life history of the theropod,” he said.
example.zh: “这种行为形式，不管是独立性、运动能力，还是亲代抚育和发育过程，都与兽脚类恐龙的生活史相似，”他说。

example.en: a cloudy night with some light rain
example.zh: 伴有些许小雨的多云的夜晚

example.en: In terms of valuation, the run of strong earnings combined with declining stock prices translate into some attractively priced stocks.
example.zh: 在估值方面，强劲的盈利走势加上下跌的股价，其结果就是价格具有吸引力的股票。

example.en: the snowy fields
example.zh: 被雪覆盖的田野

example.en: The Turner Prize was inaugurated in 1984.
example.zh: 特纳奖于1984年正式设立。

phrases.zh: 酶联免疫试剂盒（Enzyme Linked Immunosorbent Assay Kit）
重复工具包；维修工具；工作服

example.en: Sally keeps her make-up kit in her bag.
example.zh: 萨莉把化妆包放在手提包里。

example.en: the 17 most heavily indebted nations
example.zh: 17个负债最重的国家

phrases.zh: 高速缓冲存储器；快取记忆体

example.en: In this way, postmodernism might be seen as the delayed germination of an older seed, planted by artists like Marcel Duchamp, during modernism’s high noon of the 1920s and 1930s.
example.zh: 按这种理解，后现代主义可被看成一粒过往的种子延迟了的萌芽，这粒种子由马塞尔•杜尚等艺术家种在20世纪二三十年代现代主义的繁盛时期。

example.en: Raj crept out of the house unseen.
example.zh: 拉杰悄悄地溜出了房子。

example.en: a banquet for 250 distinguished guests
example.zh: 250位贵宾出席的宴会

example.en: the regions of the brain that are responsible for memory and cognition
example.zh: 大脑主管记忆与认知的区域

example.en: The doctor said the problem lied in its forelimb and it would not die.
example.zh: 医生说问题在于它的前肢上，不过它不会死的。

translations.text: 含石灰的, 石灰似的

example.en: Ultimately, the concretion mechanism of limy composite concretion earth is made certain by way of performance contrast among different specimens.
example.zh: 通过不同试件的性能对比，确定石灰类复合团结土的团结机理。

translations.text: 石版印刷的, 石版的

example.en: a coastal lagoon
example.zh: 沿海潟湖

example.en: ...a flat, square wristwatch with classic Roman numerals.
example.zh: ...一块扁平、有标准罗马数字的正方形手表。

example.en: exotic birds with colourful crests
example.zh: 羽冠鲜艳多彩的珍禽

example.en: Our bodies have no centrality either.
example.zh: 我们的身体也没有中心。

translations.text: 不知足的, 贪求无厌的

example.en: A section of the reading public has an insatiable appetite for dirty stories about the famous.
example.zh: 阅读大众中有一部分人对名人的风流韵事的欲望总是无法满足。

phrases.zh: 前瞻研究；预期研究；远景调查

example.en: The story should act as a warning to other prospective buyers.
example.zh: 这篇报道应该可以对其他可能的购买者起到警告作用。

example.en: He was bewildered by his daughter’s reaction.
example.zh: 他被女儿的反应弄糊涂了。

phrases.zh: 妨碍司法公正；阻碍司法

example.en: an operation to remove an obstruction from her throat
example.zh: 去除她喉咙里阻塞物的手术

example.en: It remained very difficult to procure food, fuel, and other daily necessities.
example.zh: 当时仍然很难获得食品、燃料和其他日用必需品。

phrases.zh: 全资子公司；全资附属机构；全资拥有子公司
全资附属公司；全部控股子公司

example.en: The marketing department has always played a subsidiary role to the sales department.
example.zh: 营销部一直都扮演着销售部的辅助角色。

example.en: The time consuming process for making processed meats creates high bacteria counts and putrefaction in the meat which need to be treated with chemicals.
example.zh: 在加工面粉的时会产生大量细菌，还有腐败的肉制品需要用化学物品来处理。

translations.text: 加热杀菌法, 巴斯德杀菌法

example.en: It's a very beautiful place in the summertime.
example.zh: 这里夏季时很美。

example.en: Electricity is the main material for chlorate production.
example.zh: 电是生产氯酸盐的主要原料。

phrases.zh: 道路交汇处；道路交叉口；道路交叉

example.en: We crossed at a busy intersection.
example.zh: 我们穿过了一个繁忙的道路交叉口。

translations.text: 行走的人或动物, 跳舞者

example.en: His version of events is pure supposition .
example.zh: 他对事情的说法纯属推测。

example.en: Feel the cold, glass-like smoothness and the crevices and lines that make me what I am.
example.zh: 感觉玻璃般的冰冷与光滑，以及其中的裂缝和刮痕，感受我的存在。

example.en: Well, we cut it into vertically simple pieces.
example.zh: 我们把它分割为垂直简单的部分。

example.en: There is a natural dichotomy between the two sides of one’s personality that is usually displayed between the different types of social groups with which an individual may identify oneself.
example.zh: 在一个人性格的这两方面之间，存在着一种自然的两分法。 个人的性格一般就体现在这一个人所可能认同的不同社会群体之间。

translations.text: 大剪刀, 快速帆船修剪者

example.en: nail clippers
example.zh: 指甲剪

translations.text: 果实结得多的, 多产的

phrases.zh: n. 红旗；危险信号；[喻]惹人生气的事物

example.en: Children waving flags greeted the Russian leader.
example.zh: 孩子们挥舞着旗帜，欢迎俄罗斯领导人。

example.en: The ancient Greeks were aware of other acoustical principles, at least empirically.
example.zh: 至少在实践上，古希腊人也知道其他的声学原理。

example.en: She has a huge amount of Victorian kitchenware.
example.zh: 她拥有维多利亚时代的大量厨房用具。

example.en: Attempts to intimidate her failed.
example.zh: 恐吓她的企图失败了。

example.en: Some of these old tools are still serviceable.
example.zh: 这些旧工具有些仍可使用。

example.en: white chalky soil
example.zh: 白色的白垩质土壤

translations.text: 约克郡,约克夏(英国英格兰原郡名)

phrases.zh: 西约克郡（位于英国英格兰北部）

example.en: WL: I think, Yorkshire and the New Forest.
example.zh: 我想，是约克郡和新森林地区。

translations.text: 无生命的, 非活体的

example.zh: 1860年，路易斯巴斯德做了个实验，最终反驳了“自然发生说”，这一说认为生命源源不断于无生命的物体。

example.zh: “明天我要去阿普尔比。”“太巧了！我也要去那里。”

example.zh: 你真该听我的建议。

example.zh: 但是，这些积极行动的根本原因当然不全是出于经济目的。

example.zh: 选举伦敦市长

example.zh: 有一次，她甚至大叫着让警察向黑猩猩射击，以便阻止他的攻击。

example.zh: 他在自来水厂工作。

example.en: One parkway and three expressways meet here, andclose to 300, 000 vehicles a day are forced to reduce speed while navigating anetwork of tightly curved ramps.
example.zh: 一条景观道路（parkway）和三条快速路在此交汇，近30万辆机动车每天被迫在急转的弯道（tightly curved ramps）路网中减速慢行。

example.zh: 这孩子的神情宁静可爱。

example.zh: 日落大道

example.en: If I now scroll down to the actual implementation, now does this work or not work?
example.zh: 如果现在我向下滚动到实际的执行中，这个是可用的还是不可用的呢？

example.en: a multipurpose building
example.zh: 多用途大楼

example.zh: 轻松的音乐

example.en: Often, the target is created when the consolidation pattern is first applied so that no access controls preexist and possibly need to be defined.
example.zh: 通常在首次应用整合模式时创建目标，这样不存在任何访问控制，所以可能需要对其进行定义。

example.zh: 精神失常的早期征兆

example.en: This metamorphic rock has been compressed for millions of years.
example.zh: 这种变质岩已经过数百万年的压缩。

example.zh: 一个小孩正沿着人行道蹒跚行走。

example.en: An alternative to monetary damages is an injunction prohibiting publication of the allegedly libelous material.
example.zh: 除经济赔偿之外的另一种做法是颁布禁令，禁止发表被指称诽谤的材料。

phrases.zh: 房地产经纪人，不动产经纪人
n. 报关行；海关经纪人

example.zh: 房地产经纪人

example.zh: 芳香油

translations.text: 怪异的, 超自然的, 不可思议的

example.en: A really weird thing happened last night.
example.zh: 昨晚发生了一件非常奇怪的事。

example.en: flowers pollinated by bees
example.zh: 由蜜蜂授粉的花

example.en: The plane started taxiing down the runway.
example.zh: 该飞机开始沿跑道滑行。

translations.text: 不可抵抗的,不能压制的

example.en: I was overcome by an irresistible urge to cry.
example.zh: 我控制不住想大哭一场。

example.en: Pickpocketing is rampant in the downtown area.
example.zh: 闹市区扒窃活动猖獗。

example.en: ‘What do you think of my new flatmate?’ ‘He’s absolutely gorgeous !’
example.zh: “你觉得我的新室友怎么样？”“他帅极了！”

example.zh: 不受欢迎的新闻界的侵扰

translations.text: 捏, 撮 v夹痛,节省

example.en: She gave him a playful pinch.
example.zh: 她开玩笑地捏了他一把。

translations.text: 使不活泼, 阻止活动

example.en: ...the notion that pornography degrades women.
example.zh: …色情作品贬低妇女的这种看法。

example.en: The new research provides early evidence that climate change may be playing a role in driving down pollination.
example.zh: 这项新的研究提供了初步证据，气候变化可能是促使授粉减少的一个因素。

example.en: The vault was opened and the body found to be well preserved, his features easily recognizable.
example.zh: 地窖被打开了, 尸体被发现保存完好, 他的面容很容易辨认。

example.en: Even when I call, he receives unwillingly.
example.zh: 即使我登门拜访， 他也是很不情愿地接待我。

example.en: If she gets the nod, Kagan says she will consider every case impartially and with commitment to principle.
example.zh: Kagan 说如果她能通过，她将公平地处理每个案子并忠于原则办事。

example.en: One dose of penicillin can wipe out the infection.
example.zh: 一剂青霉素即可消除感染。

example.en: One solution is to retrain the long-term unemployed.
example.zh: 一个解决办法是对长期失业的人进行再培训。

example.en: It is for this reason that television proves such a boon to so many people.
example.zh: 正是这个原因电视机成为这么多人的一大福音。

translations.text: 民主政治, 民主主义

phrases.zh: n. 社会主义；社会民主主义
协商民主；审议民主；商议性民主
自由民主；自由民主主义；自由民主制（一种政府形式，由人民选出的民意代表行使决策权力）

example.en: a return to democracy after 16 years of military rule
example.zh: 16年军人统治后民主制度的恢复

example.en: The conflict of the class interests results in the pitiless class-struggle that unavoidably leads to the victory of the most numerous and most wronged class, the proletariat.
example.zh: 阶级利益的冲突导致了无情的阶级斗争，从而不可避免地导致了最广大的、最受虐待的阶级，即无产阶级的胜利。

example.en: To the layman (= laymen in general ) all these plants look pretty similar.
example.zh: 对外行的人来说，这些植物看起来都很相似。

translations.text: (主要用于赛马, 赛狗的)跑道

example.en: ...the Breeders' Cup, run Oct. 26 at Arlington racetrack near Chicago.
example.zh: …育马者杯比赛，于10月26日在芝加哥附近的阿灵顿赛马场举行。

example.en: Her husband was a small, inoffensive-looking man.
example.zh: 她丈夫个子不高，看上去很随和。

example.en: This novel is a legend of a struggler and explorer.
example.zh: 这小说是一个奋斗者和探索者的传奇。

phrases.zh: n. 优秀奖；鼓励奖；荣誉奖

translations.text: 使怀孕, 使受精 a怀孕的, 充满的

example.en: Undercover officers found drug-making equipment used to impregnate paper with LSD.
example.zh: 卧底警官发现了用于使迷幻药渗入纸张的毒品制造设备。

example.en: The others barely glanced at it and went back to their shovels, almost enthusiastically, searching for the French Woman, but I went up to the body and forced myself to look at it closely.
example.zh: 其他的人几乎连看都没看上一眼，就拿起他们的锹，差不多都很热心地去寻找那个法国女人的尸体，但我凑到那具尸体前，迫使我自己仔细地看看。

phrases.zh: 连续营业日；连续作业日

example.en: It had rained for four consecutive days.
example.zh: 雨接连下了四天。

translations.text: 贫困的, 缺乏生活必需品的

example.en: a needy family
example.zh: 贫困家庭

example.en: a bequest of $5,000
example.zh: 五千美元的遗产

example.en: couples who deliberately remain childless
example.zh: 故意不要孩子的夫妇

example.en: What about the other parts of the cuticle?
example.zh: 有关的角质层的其他部分呢？

example.en: Her short spiky hair is damp with sweat.
example.zh: 她又硬又直的短发被汗浸湿了。

translations.text: 象蜡的,苍白的, 柔软的,

example.en: the waxy blossoms of the water lily
example.zh: 睡莲那如蜡一般的花朵

example.en: The unpalatable truth is that the team isn’t getting any better.
example.zh: 让人难以接受的事实是这个队没有任何进步。

example.en: The pigment in the upper layer of skin (epidermis) that gives your skin its normal color is called melanin.
example.zh: 在浅层皮肤（表皮）中有种色素能让你的皮肤保持其正常的颜色，称为黑色素。

example.en: The broken limb must be immobilized immediately.
example.zh: 断肢必须立即加以固定。

example.en: The small fines for this type of crime do not act as much of a deterrent .
example.zh: 对于这种罪行，小额罚金起不到多大的威慑作用。

example.en: ...pests like aphids which infest cereal crops.
example.zh: …像蚜虫那样大肆侵害谷类作物的害虫。

translations.text: 大牧场(或大农场)工人住的棚屋
破坏, 裂口 vt打破, 突破

example.en: She wanted to help heal the breach between them.
example.zh: 她想帮助他们修复破裂的关系。

example.en: He coloured the picture with crayon.
example.zh: 他用蜡笔给画上色。

example.en: unwary travellers
example.zh: 毫无戒备的旅行者

example.en: Homo sapiens are one of the most notable exceptions, leading some scientists to think fatherhood is an important part of what makes us human.
example.zh: 现代人是最值得注意的一个例外，致使一些科学家认为父道在培养孩子富有人情味方面起着重要作用。

example.en: His conduct roused the suspicion of the police.
example.zh: 他的举动引起了警察的怀疑。

example.en: Bombastic boasts—"We are positioned to become the preeminent provider of XYZ"—do not constitute a position.
example.zh: 言过其实的自夸——“我们定位于成为XYZ的卓越供应商”——并不能构建其地位。

example.en: However, if you want to wear a print, choose a print that's low in contrast and monochromatic in color.
example.zh: 然而，假如你实在想穿喷绘衣服，那就选择一件单色、低对比度的。

example.en: At that time, deaf children were not considered educable.
example.zh: 当时认为失聪的儿童无法教育。

example.en: tame elephants
example.zh: 驯养的大象

example.zh: 聪明的人

example.en: He got involved in a credit card scam.
example.zh: 他卷入了一桩信用卡诈骗事件。

phrases.zh: 如坐针毡；焦躁不安；手脚发麻
[口语]把某事的责任加上某人身上，把某事归罪于某人

example.en: ...a box of needles and pins.
example.zh: …一盒缝衣针和别针。

example.zh: 机敏的政治家

example.zh: …飞奔160英里赶向医院。

phrases.zh: 卵黄囊瘤；卵巢内胚层窦瘤

example.zh: 只有蛋黄含胆固醇。

example.zh: 这艘船饰有红、蓝雕刻。

example.zh: 学习迟缓者的需要

example.zh: 该地区发生了几宗偷窃案。

translations.text: 没有人看的, 无学问的

example.en: This new perspective -- that a certain unremitting flux is the norm -- has illuminated past data for reinterpretation.
example.zh: 这个新观点——即某种不停的流动是常态——阐明了用于重新解释的历史数据。

phrases.zh: 轮胎面；汽车外带；车轮踏面

translations.text: 填迟的日期 n事后日期
[医]颠狂, 狂躁, 癖好, 狂热

example.zh: 恐龙热兴起于19世纪晚期。

example.en: They bought an old schoolhouse to live in and built a workshop in the basement.
example.zh: 他们买了座旧校舍居住，还在地下室建了个作坊。

example.en: My message is "If you try to smuggle drugs you are stupid."
example.zh: 我的讯息是，“你若企图走私毒品，那是犯傻。”

example.en: We went for the bottle of whisky that we had stashed behind the bookcase.
example.zh: 我们去取那瓶我们藏在书柜后面的威士忌。

example.en: He became quarrelsome after drinking too much.
example.zh: 他喝多了就爱找人吵架。

example.en: a speedy recovery from injury
example.zh: 受伤后的迅速康复

example.en: Participation in the program would be voluntary and participants could prepay the government loan at any time.
example.zh: 参加这以项目是自愿的，参与者可以在任何时间将贷款预付给政府。

example.en: that loathsome little man
example.zh: 那个讨厌的小男人

translations.text: 赝品  a伪造的 v伪造

example.en: Levi Strauss says counterfeits of the company's jeans are flooding Europe.
example.zh: 利瓦伊·斯特劳斯说该公司牛仔裤的仿冒品充斥着欧洲市场。

example.en: a package marked ‘ return to sender ’
example.zh: 标有“退回寄件人”字样的包裹

translations.text: 使附于, 粘贴 n[语]词缀

example.en: A string of scandals is obsessing America.
example.zh: 一系列丑闻在困扰着美国。

translations.text: 毁坏, 推翻, 粉碎

example.en: He demolished my argument in minutes.
example.zh: 他几分钟内就把我的论点驳倒了。

translations.text: 高尔夫球 vi打高尔夫球

example.en: He plays golf on Sundays.
example.zh: 他星期天都去打高尔夫球。

translations.text: 使结冰, 以冰(或冰河)覆盖

example.en: The overall ambience of the room is cosy.
example.zh: 这个房间的整体氛围是舒适的。

phrases.zh: 骑士骑马跨跃栅栏时挥动一只手臂以保持平衡

example.en: New York’s yellow cabs
example.zh: 纽约的黄色出租车

translations.text: 狂暴, 狂怒 vt使发狂

phrases.zh: 通过新闻媒介无情攻击或利用某人

example.en: Doreen had worked herself into a frenzy .
example.zh: 多琳一阵狂怒。

example.en: He was behaving like a character in a Victorian melodrama.
example.zh: 他表现得就像维多利亚时代情节剧里的角色。

translations.text: 财宝, 财富 vt珍爱

phrases.zh: n. 无主珍宝，无主埋藏物

example.en: The Book of Kells is Trinity College’s greatest treasure.
example.zh: 《凯尔经》是三一学院的镇院之宝。

translations.text: 辛辛那提（美国俄亥俄州西南部城市）

example.en: We never went back. Instead, we moved to a house near Cincinnati, far from the river.
example.zh: 我们再也没有回去，而是举家迁往离河很远的辛辛那提附近的另一幢房子。

translations.text: 被发现的东西, 收藏的东西

phrases.zh: n. 无主珍宝，无主埋藏物

example.en: But at the stern of the ship, divers found a trove of gold and silver and high-grade ceramics whose significance is more mysterious.
example.zh: 但是潜水人员在船尾部发现了一个由金、银以及高级陶瓷打造的收藏品，这件收藏品的意义更加神秘。

translations.text: 赌, 打赌 v赌, 赌钱

phrases.zh: 最好的办法；最好的措施

example.en: a £50 bet
example.zh: 50英镑的赌注

translations.text: 迷路, 迷宫, 难解的事物

phrases.zh: 迷宫式密封；曲径密封垫片

example.en: ...the labyrinth of corridors.
example.zh: …迷宫般的走廊。

phrases.zh: 毛石堆；毛石基；堆石斜坡堤

example.en: Brick rubble is useful as the base for paths and patios.
example.zh: 碎砖可用作道路和天井的基石。

example.en: Large-scale inflation is a recipe for disaster.
example.zh: 大规模的通货膨胀有可能导致灾难。

translations.text: 人工降雨装置,喷灌装置
去年 ad过去不久的岁月

example.en: The modern-day sex symbol has now taken the place of the old-fashioned hero of yesteryear.
example.zh: 当今的性感偶像已经取代了往昔过时的英雄形象。

example.en: According to local lore, a ghost still haunts the castle.
example.zh: 根据当地人的传说，城堡里至今仍然闹鬼。

example.en: A vacant plot of land adjoins his house.
example.zh: 有一块空地紧挨着他家。

translations.text: 灰泥,迫击炮 vt用灰泥结合

example.en: A cameraman was killed when his vehicle came under mortar fire .
example.zh: 一名摄影师因所乘坐的汽车遭到迫击炮袭击而丧生。

translations.text: 不调和的, 不适宜的

example.en: The incongruity of her situation struck Gina with unpleasant force.
example.zh: 吉娜猛然意识到自己处境尴尬，心里很不舒服。

example.en: The northwestern tableland area has a continental plateau climate with long and chilly winter and cool humid summer.
example.zh: 西北高原地区是大陆高原气候，有漫长而寒冷的冬季，凉爽而湿润的夏季。

translations.text: 尽善尽美, 完美, 完成

example.en: My father expected perfection from all of us.
example.zh: 父亲期望我们都尽善尽美。

example.en: Use a red gloss on your bottom lip to give it fullness.
example.zh: 下唇使用红色唇彩让它显得丰盈饱满。

translations.text: 畏缩, 弹回 vi退却, 畏缩

example.en: ...his small body jerking in recoil from the volume of his shouting.
example.zh: …他小小身体在他大声的叫喊中畏缩地抽搐着。

example.en: Rakae Jamil, a musicologist with the Sanjan Nagar Institute of Philosophy and Arts in Lahore, says there is no doubt that Michael Jackson influenced the pop scene in Pakistan.
example.zh: 拉齐.贾米尔是拉合尔的桑贾恩.纳加尔哲学和艺术研究所的音乐理论家。 他说，迈克尔.杰克逊影响了巴基斯坦的流行歌坛，这点是毫无疑问的。

example.en: He found that running long distances was not his forte .
example.zh: 他发现长跑并不是他的强项。

example.en: ...using all manner of percussive effects.
example.zh: ...运用各种打击乐效果。

example.en: The abbey was a maze of multistory wings, each added in a differing century, the architecture conspiring to create a jumbled complex that now housed four hundred brothers.
example.zh: 修道院的结构是迷宫似的多层侧翼，每个侧翼都在不同的世纪里被添上，那建筑拼成一混乱的复合体，里面现在住着四百多个圣殿武士。

translations.text: 锤头 a锤头状的, 鲁钝的

example.en: The government shoulders ethic obligation, she has to induct and maintain the rationalization of the living world.
example.zh: 政府在生活世界中引导和维护生活世界的合理化，肩负著伦理责任；

example.en: Their aims are coincident with ours.
example.zh: 他们的目标和我们的一致。

example.en: ...a spirit of forgiveness and national reconciliation.
example.zh: …一种宽恕与民族和解的精神。

example.en: He took a spoonful of the stew and ate it.
example.zh: 他舀起一匙炖菜吃了下去。

example.en: Instead of eating hunched pleasurably over a book, I look out of the window and chew every mouthful thoroughly, aware of every single oat and nut and dried bit of apple as it goes down.
example.zh: 送孩子们去学校后，我不再放松地边吃早饭边看书，而是盯着窗外，仔细地嚼着嘴里的食物：每一粒燕麦、每一颗坚果、每一片苹果干。

example.en: So it appears that banks do an unusually lousy job of differentiating themselves.
example.zh: 如此看来，银行业者通常在区分自己的工作上太过糟糕。

example.en: Of course, anyone knows that it is impossible to play a symphonic work with just three strings.
example.zh: 当然，每个人都知道，只用三根弦来演奏交响乐是不可能的。

phrases.zh: [古语]十分严肃地，一本正经地

example.en: The relationship had been important to me and its loss left me feeling sad and empty.
example.zh: 这种关系对我一直都很重要，失去它让我感到难过而空虚。

translations.text: 小提琴演奏者, 小提琴家

example.en: Rose's father was a talented violinist.
example.zh: 罗斯的父亲是一位天才的小提琴手。

example.en: A cellist is always shortening and lengthening the strings.
example.zh: 大提琴演奏家总是在压缩或拉长弦

example.en: A new upsurge in construction is in the making.
example.zh: 一个建设的新高潮正在兴起。

example.zh: 近年来电脑游戏的惊人成功

example.en: In fact, he wrote his dissertation on the midocean ridge.
example.zh: 实际上，他的博士论文就是关于中央山脊的研究。

example.en: B: It occurs when a component reaches its limit for deformation.
example.zh: B：当一个部件达到了变形的极限时，就会发生断裂。

example.zh: 《小溪边》的周六综合版

example.en: However, to do so, it must find an unoccupied territory and a member of the opposite sex with which to mate.
example.zh: 然而，要想成为领头狼，必须找到一块未被占领的领地和一头能够与之交配的异性狼。

空的, 头脑空虚的,空缺的

example.en: Only a few apartments were still vacant.
example.zh: 只有几套公寓仍然空着。

example.en: a honeymoon suite
example.zh: 蜜月套房

example.en: Pigs scavenged among the rubbish.
example.zh: 猪在垃圾堆里觅食。

example.en: Months are a conventional subdivision of the year.
example.zh: 月份是年的常规分支。

phrases.zh: 青少年糖尿病；幼年型糖尿病

example.zh: 少年犯罪

example.en: He felt that she had betrayed him.
example.zh: 他感觉她背叛了自己。

example.en: She seems very sensible.
example.zh: 她好像很明智。

example.en: Boardwalks on the forest floor and the treetop level let visitors experience the rain forest up close.
example.zh: 在树顶上搭建的森林地面走道可以让游客近距离地接触热带雨林。

example.en: Most people of European or African ancestry have the "wet" kind: thick and sticky.
example.zh: 大多数欧洲或者非洲血统的人耳垢是湿的，厚的，有粘性的。

example.en: Somehow she'd always been a child in his mind, pure and virginal.
example.zh: 不知何故，她在他心里一直是个天真无邪的孩子。

example.en: The ancestry of the piano can be traced to the early keyboard instruments of the fifteenth and sixteenth centuries -- the spinet, the dulcimer, and the virginal.
example.zh: 钢琴的家系可以追溯至15至16世纪早期的键盘乐器，包括小型拨弦琴、洋琴和维金娜琴。

translations.text: 未公开出版的,未发表过的
短桨, 划桨 v划桨,拌

example.en: We might be able to push ourselves across with the paddle.
example.zh: 我们或许可以自己划桨过去。

example.en: a bundle of papers tied up with twine
example.zh: 用双股线捆扎起来的一摞文件

translations.text: 混杂, 搞乱 n混乱

example.en: The photographs were all jumbled up.
example.zh: 照片乱七八糟地堆在一起。

phrases.zh: n. 沥青材料；沥青物料

example.en: The only practicable course of action is to sell the company.
example.zh: 唯一可行的做法是把公司卖掉。

example.en: Have steps been taken to acquaint breeders with their right to apply for licenses?
example.zh: 已经采取措施让饲养动物者了解他们申请执照的权利了吗？

translations.text: 苦工, 圈套 v费力地做
不能克服的,不能超越的

example.en: The language difference proved an insurmountable barrier.
example.zh: 语言差异是难以克服的障碍。

translations.text: 录象, 视频 a视频的

example.en: a video clip shown on the Internet
example.zh: 因特网上的一段视频

example.en: Reduce packaging by eating more whole, unprocessed foods and using the bulk bins for items that have a long shelf-life.
example.zh: 减少包装，通过吃全食品、未经加工的食品以及对物品使用有很长的保质期的散装箱。

translations.text: 使符合标准, 使标准化

example.en: Attempts to standardize English spelling have never been successful.
example.zh: 统一英语拼写的尝试从未成功过。

example.en: Always wash your hands after handling uncooked meat.
example.zh: 碰过生肉后一定要洗手。

example.en: the weather forecaster
example.zh: 气象预报员

translations.text: 暴风雨的, 激烈的, 暴怒的

example.en: The sky was starting to look stormy.
example.zh: 开始变天了，看上去暴风雨将至。

translations.text: 未触及的, 未改变的

example.en: Several papers lay untouched on the desk.
example.zh: 有几份文件原封不动地放在书桌上。

translations.text: 警察 vt管辖 a警察的

example.en: Police surrounded the courthouse.
example.zh: 警察围在法院大楼四周。

example.en: ...a deep sense of humility.
example.zh: …深深的谦卑感。

example.en: As he thought it over, his anger gradually dissipated.
example.zh: 他想明白后，怒气就渐渐消了。

example.en: They are building a new hospital.
example.zh: 他们正在建一家新医院。

translations.text: 长鼻类的 n长鼻目动物

example.en: Police are sifting through the evidence.
example.zh: 警方在筛查证据。

translations.text: 额外费用, 奖金, 奖赏

phrases.zh: 溢价；非常珍贵；在票面价值以上
风险溢价；风险酬金；风险报酬

example.en: Consumers are prepared to pay a premium for organically grown vegetables.
example.zh: 消费者愿意多花钱购买有机蔬菜。

translations.text: 整洁的, 灵巧的, 优雅的

example.en: neat handwriting
example.zh: 工整的笔迹

example.en: Error is often the precursor of what is correct.
example.zh: 错误常常是正确的先导。

example.en: We're going to have to economize from now on.
example.zh: 我们得从现在起节省开支。

phrases.zh: 纽黑文市（美国康涅狄格州港市）
避税场所（税率很低的国家或地区）

example.en: But in states organized like that of France, it is impossible to hold them with such tranquillity.
example.zh: 但是在像法兰西那样组织的国家里，以这样的平静来维持政权是不可能的事情。

example.en: New machinery has enhanced the company’s productivity and competitiveness.
example.zh: 新机器帮助公司提高了生产力，增强了竞争力。

example.en: ...the custodian of the holy shrines in Mecca and Medina.
example.zh: …在麦加和麦地那的圣地的管理员。

translations.text: (使)淤塞, (使)停滞, (使)沉滞, (使)变萧条

example.en: Industrial production is stagnating.
example.zh: 工业生产停滞不前。

example.en: He emigrated to Belgium.
example.zh: 他移民去了比利时。

phrases.zh: 对做过的事表示遗憾、后悔

example.en: Larry said he had no regrets about retiring.
example.zh: 拉里曾说他对于退休没有任何遗憾。

example.en: Please have the civility to knock before you enter next time.
example.zh: 下次你进来之前要有点礼貌——先敲门。

translations.text: 不能架桥的,不能逾越的

example.en: ...the so-called unbridgeable gap between the world of humans and that of chimpanzees.
example.zh: ...人类社会和黑猩猩社会间所谓的不可逾越的鸿沟。

example.en: ...memories of her father's complete abandonment of her.
example.zh: …她父亲对她的彻底抛弃的那些记忆。

example.en: Both realism and naturalism are mimetic systems or practices of representation.
example.zh: 现实主义和自然主义都是模仿的做法或者表现的习惯而已。

example.en: the fictive world of James Bond
example.zh: 詹姆斯•邦德的虚构世界

phrases.zh: 不寒而栗；由于恐惧而发抖

translations.text: 猛烈, 暴力, 暴虐

phrases.zh: 家庭暴力；家庭暴力事件

example.en: There is too much sex and violence on TV these days.
example.zh: 如今电视上性爱和暴力场面太多。

translations.text: 精神错乱, 疯狂, 愚顽

example.en: The court acquitted Campbell on the grounds of temporary insanity.
example.zh: 法庭以坎贝尔一时精神错乱为由判他无罪释放。

phrases.zh: v. 竭力维持；弥补…的不足
支支吾吾；哼哼哈哈；犹豫

example.en: The seamstress bound the hem of the dress with a ruffle.
example.zh: 女裁缝用褶裥饰边给女上衣镶边。

浑身湿透；(衣服)湿得拧得出水来

translations.text: 盐水的, 咸的, 海水的

example.en: All of it is growing alarmingly acidic, as the carbon dioxide spewed out by modern activities finds its way into the briny.
example.zh: 现代生产中喷涌而出的二氧化碳最终会融入了海水，海洋整体的酸化也令人担忧。

example.en: Fig. 5 depicts the Southern Hemisphere midlatitude 300-hPa geopotential height field.
example.zh: 图5给出南半球中纬度300百帕位势高度场。

translations.text: 使新生, 重建 a新生的, 更新的

example.en: Small nodules form as the liver cells regenerate.
example.zh: 肝细胞再生时会形成一些小结节。

translations.text: 取出内脏, 除去精华

example.en: ...strangling and eviscerating rabbits for the pot.
example.zh: ...勒死并取出兔子的内脏以便下锅。

example.en: Use the spices sparingly .
example.zh: 这种香料只要用一点点。

example.zh: 有几个小孩用水枪朝她脸上喷水。

translations.text: 支持, 制裁 vt支持, 鼓励

example.en: a resolution to impose sanctions (= start using sanctions ) on DPRK
example.zh: 对朝鲜实施制裁的决议

example.en: an antagonistic attitude
example.zh: 对抗态度

example.en: Jeremy does play cricket, but very infrequently.
example.zh: 杰里米确实玩板球，但次数很少。

example.en: ...a society which was politically quiescent and above all deferential.
example.zh: ...一个遵循顺从至上及政治上平静的社会。

example.en: Attempting to drown herself in inanity, she marries Peter Keating, only to leave him for newspaper tycoon Gail Wynand, publisher of the Banner, where Toohey's column appears.
example.zh: 为了把自己淹没在空虚之中，她先嫁给了彼特·基廷，然后仅仅是为了离开他而选择了报业大亨盖尔·威纳德。 威纳德是巴纳出版社的老板，也就是图希的专栏出现的地方。

translations.text: 传奇小说作家, 讲虚构故事的人
醒目地, 引人侧目地

example.en: one of the most strikingly attractive regions in Britain
example.zh: 英国风景异常美丽的地区之一

example.en: Something akin to panic overwhelmed him.
example.zh: 一种近似惊恐的感觉使他不知所措。

translations.text: 狼吞虎咽的, 贪婪的

example.en: Joseph Smith was a voracious book collector.
example.zh: 约瑟夫·史密斯是一个如饥似渴的藏书家。

phrases.zh: 美食家咖啡，精制的咖啡

example.en: The seafood here is a gourmet's delight.
example.zh: 这儿的海鲜是美食家的一大享受。

example.zh: 这似乎是个荒唐的想法。

example.en: What you’re hearing is the voice of complacence.
example.zh: 你听到的是沾沾自喜的声音。

example.zh: 宝宝时刻都要有人照看。
